channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Unknown languages (Daily)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Unknown languages nel periodo daily.

item.title: 📝 mixedstormplay/photoshop-batch-export-optimizer (103 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mixedstormplay

📝 Repository: mixedstormplay/photoshop-batch-export-optimizer

📄 Descrizione: Intelligent batch export plugin for Photoshop CC 2024+ with adaptive compression, format optimization, and automated asset organization. Export hundreds of layers with consistent quality and minimal file sizes. Includes web, mobile, ecommerce, and print profiles. Built for production teams and design studios.

⭐ Stelle: 103

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: abobe ai batch batch-export batch-export-optimizer effects export optimizer photoshop photoshop-batch

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-07-15T00:22:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-15T04:46:03Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 mudsoldiermove/photoshop-smart-layer-manager (103 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mudsoldiermove

📝 Repository: mudsoldiermove/photoshop-smart-layer-manager

📄 Descrizione: Advanced layer organization and automation plugin for Adobe Photoshop CC 2024+. Intelligent grouping, bulk renaming, hierarchy detection, and smart layer management powered by adaptive algorithms. Works with design systems, production pipelines, and complex document structures. Native UXP extension.

⭐ Stelle: 103

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: HTML

🏷️ Topics: abobe ai layer layer-manager photoshop uxp-plugin

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-15T04:44:47Z

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: EnamelSpirit

📝 Repository: EnamelSpirit/ae-animation-expressions

📄 Descrizione: Professional expression-based animation framework for After Effects 2024+. Automates text sequencing, layer synchronization, and motion keyframe generation with intelligent timing algorithms and adaptive animation presets. Built for motion designers, video producers, and animation studios.

item.title: 📝 magmaduckplain/ae-expression-library (102 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: magmaduckplain

📝 Repository: magmaduckplain/ae-expression-library

📄 Descrizione: Production-ready expression toolkit for Adobe After Effects 2024+. Advanced property linking, dynamic text animation, sophisticated camera control, adaptive layer management, and automated timing solutions. Real-time preview with interactive UI panel. Built for motion designers, VFX artists, and broadcast production teams.

item.description:
👤 Owner: OrientalYomu

📝 Repository: OrientalYomu/SMS-Call-Bomber

📄 Descrizione: SMS + Call Bomber — multi-threaded phone number flooder that sends mass SMS messages and initiates automated calls through 50+ public API gateways. item.title: 🐍 Anahitam1991/Exodus-Fake-Balance (10 ⭐)

👤 Owner: Anahitam1991

📝 Repository: Anahitam1991/Exodus-Fake-Balance

📄 Descrizione: Exodus Fake Balance — Native balance overlay tool for Exodus wallet with real-time spoofing across BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and 200+ assets, persistent hooks, and screenshot-safe display rendering

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Python

🏷️ Topics: crypto-wallet-simulator exodus exodus-app exodus-fake-balance exodus-fake-balance-tool exodus-fake-money exodus-sdk-js exodus-wallet exodus-wallet-sdk fake-balance fake-balance-exodus fake-transaction flash-crypto-2025 flash-eth-software flash-loan flasher-script flasher-tool okx-fake-balance phantom-fake-money trustwallet-clone
